summary: Site is structurally sound. test.js 3594/0 — all internal links, tab structure, data cross-references, and prediction panels pass. Build reproducibility passes (workspace data → workspace HTML = 0 diff). The main operational event is a decider push 403 at 05:19Z (commit 4c6c688 stuck in workspace, workspace-sync rescue expected within 1h). This explains the 7 workspace-only files and the 2-line git vs workspace HTML diff. Two critical citation issues (ISS-1944 Van Camp DOI 404, ISS-1945 Tomas wrong PII) are already tracked and awaiting decider patches. Pending curmudgeon digest has 2 critical-severity findings (6 unprocessed reviews total, all recent). One moderate expansion tracker issue: EXP-296 has proper fields but no tracker entry — may be lost work for WIN-043 defense. One minor anomalous file (WIN-067.c3.json.build.js, 0-byte wrong extension) should be deleted. No nav chain breaks, no broken internal anchors, no theme color violations, no discoverability gaps.
